_comment: Runtime configuration for the agent. This file is the source of truth for agent identity, manager identity, ADO/team scope, paths, locale, signature wording, voice, and feature flags. Helpers in .copilot/skills/_shared/config.ps1 read it. Discovered by walking up from $PSScriptRoot looking for config/agent.json (or via $env:AGENT_ROOT). Phase 5 of the templatize-Nirvana refactor extracted these values from hardcoded strings in helpers and runners.

paths._comment: Repo-local paths are stored as forward-slash paths relative to the agent root (the dir containing config/). External paths can use %ENVVAR% references (e.g. %USERPROFILE%) which are expanded at use time by Resolve-AgentPath. Do NOT store an absolute agent_root here: it is derived from the location of this file.

signature._comment: Signature wording is assembled in _shared/signature.ps1 from manager.first_name + agent.name. The {first} placeholder in auto_reply_disclosure is substituted with manager.first_name. brand_html, when non-empty, overrides the default _Format-AgentBrand auto-detection (which bolds the manager.first_name prefix when agent.name starts with it -- e.g. 'Nir' + 'Nirvana' -> 'Nirvana'). whatsapp_group_signature_he is a Hebrew literal used by the whatsapp skill in the Your Team group only; ships empty in template defaults. notice_path points at an optional one-line announcement file (relative to agent root); empty file = no notice.
signature.auto_reply_disclosure: {first} is on the thread; reply directly if I got it wrong.
